IMHO, it would be better to combine the removal of the SLES12 kernel patches with the removal of the SLES12 ldiskfs patches.  That would make it easier for someone to revert if they want this functionality back.

parents.subject: LU-12477 ldiskfs: drop support for sles12

commit.subject: LU-12477 kernel: drop support for unused patches
commit.message:
LU-12477 kernel: drop support for unused patches

Remove unused patches for sles and any patches not
referenced in a series

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I3c0c9e052b5e12bf8284e8b5df66df983886ecb6
